source: Vizion TradeView / SeaVantage public dwell-time snapshots, Sept 2025
note: Seed data from research, not a live feed. Wire up scripts/fetch_dwell_times.py to a paid TradeView/port API key to automate this.

ports.note: Under significant strain from congestion and vessel bunching; one carrier recorded ~3.25 day berth wait in Aug 2025. Precise dwell figure not publicly available.
Frequently records zero waiting time; among best-performing ports globally.
